name: resolver-a4-user-beats-persona
description: ADR 0037 Phase V — full cascade: factory → profile → persona → user. Apply Standard (activeJunction = factory 'bubble', since Standard doesn't declare). Enable the `render.junction.surface` persona (declares intent `activeJunction: 'surface'`). Verify activeJunction='surface' provenance='persona'. Then `__canarySetPerfSettings({ activeJunction: 'voronoi' })` and verify it flips to 'user' with the user's value. Touches the highest-stakes precedence chain — where Wave 4 lives.

commands: (async () => { window.__canaryApplyProfile('standard'); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); const en = window.__canarySetPersonaEnabled('render.junction.surface', true); if (!en || en.ok !== true) throw new Error('enable failed: ' + JSON.stringify(en)); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); const aj1 = window.__canaryGetPerfSettings().value.activeJunction; if (aj1 !== 'surface') throw new Error('expected activeJunction=surface after persona enable, got: ' + aj1); const p1 = window.__qualiaGetSettingProvenance('activeJunction'); if (p1.value !== 'persona') throw new Error('expected provenance=persona, got: ' + p1.value); window.__canarySetPerfSettings({ activeJunction: 'voronoi' }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 200)); const aj2 = window.__canaryGetPerfSettings().value.activeJunction; if (aj2 !== 'voronoi') throw new Error('expected activeJunction=voronoi after user override, got: ' + aj2); const p2 = window.__qualiaGetSettingProvenance('activeJunction'); if (p2.value !== 'user') throw new Error('expected provenance=user after override, got: ' + p2.value); return 'A4 pass: persona=' + aj1 + ' user=' + aj2 + ' provs ok'; })()
